narration: If you've got money sitting in a regular bank savings account right now, it's quietly disappearing. Here's the math they don't want you to see.
visual: Piggy bank center-screen with coins slowly draining out the bottom. 'YOUR SAVINGS' label fades in. Amber accent numbers tick downward.

narration: The average big bank pays you just 0.06% interest. Meanwhile inflation runs around 4% a year. Your money is losing real value every single day.
visual: Two bar charts side by side: 'YOUR BANK 0.06%' (tiny bar) vs 'INFLATION 4%' (tall bar). Dollar signs erode off the savings bar.

narration: Park ten thousand dollars in a traditional savings account and you lose about $400 in real purchasing power every year. That's money just... evaporating.
visual: Stack of $10,000 bills, coins flying away animated. Counter ticking down to -$400/YEAR label. 'PER YEAR' badge pulses.

narration: Banks designed this on purpose. They bury the APY in fine print, slap the word 'safe' on it, and count on you never shopping around.
visual: Bank building SVG. Magnifying glass zooms into a document revealing tiny '0.06% APY' text. Red warning stamp appears.

narration: High-yield savings accounts pay forty to eighty times more — and your money is equally protected up to $250,000 by the FDIC. Same safety. Way more money.
visual: Side-by-side bar comparison: 'BIG BANK 0.06%' tiny bar vs 'HYSA 4-5%' tall amber bar. FDIC shield badge animates in.

narration: The switch takes ten minutes online. Keep your regular bank for bills. Park your savings somewhere that actually pays you. Your future self will thank you.
visual: Clock showing 10 minutes, piggy bank growing taller with coins raining in, 'START TODAY' CTA banner springs up.
